languages.text: "Будет исполнено, Лорд-капитан. Сила Имперского флота не оставит и шанса этим созданиям, будьте уверены".

traits.locale_text: "Будет исполнено, Лорд-капитан. Сила Имперского флота не оставит и шанса этим созданиям, будьте уверены".

languages.text: "It shall be done, Lord Captain. These creatures will stand no chance against the might of the Imperial Navy, be assured of that."
languages.original_text: "Будет исполнено, Лорд-капитан. Сила Имперского флота не оставит и шанса этим созданиям, будьте уверены".

traits.locale_text: "It shall be done, Lord Captain. The might of the Imperial Navy shall leave these creatures no chance, be assured of that."

"It will be done, Lord Captain. The full force of the dynasty fleet will leave these creatures no chance of survival, rest assured."

languages.text: 「ご安心ください、艦長様。王朝艦隊の全力を結集すれば、この生き物は生き残る余地はございません」
languages.original_text: "It will be done, Lord Captain. The full force of the dynasty fleet will leave these creatures no chance of survival, rest assured."

traits.locale_text: 「ご安心ください、艦長様。王朝艦隊の全力を結集すれば、この生き物は生き残る余地はございません」

languages.text: «Así se hará, Lord Capitán. Estas criaturas no tienen ninguna oportunidad frente al poderío de la Armada Imperial, se lo aseguro».
languages.original_text: "It shall be done, Lord Captain. These creatures will stand no chance against the might of the Imperial Navy, be assured of that."

traits.locale_text: «Así se hará, Lord Capitán. Estas criaturas no tienen ninguna oportunidad frente al poderío de la Armada Imperial, se lo aseguro».

languages.text: “遵命，舰长大人。在帝国海军的强大火力面前，这些怪物绝无幸存的可能。您尽管放心。”
languages.original_text: "It shall be done, Lord Captain. These creatures will stand no chance against the might of the Imperial Navy, be assured of that."

traits.locale_text: “遵命，舰长大人。在帝国海军的强大火力面前，这些怪物绝无幸存的可能。您尽管放心。”

languages.text: "Wird erledigt, Lord Captain. Diese Kreaturen werden gegen die Macht der imperialen Kriegsflotte keine Chance haben, das versichere ich Euch."
languages.original_text: "It shall be done, Lord Captain. These creatures will stand no chance against the might of the Imperial Navy, be assured of that."

traits.locale_text: "Wird erledigt, Lord Captain. Diese Kreaturen werden gegen die Macht der imperialen Kriegsflotte keine Chance haben, das versichere ich Euch."

languages.text: "Emredersiniz Lord Kaptan. Emin olun, bu yaratıkların İmparatorluk Donanması'nın kudretine karşı hiçbir şansı olmayacak."
languages.original_text: "It shall be done, Lord Captain. These creatures will stand no chance against the might of the Imperial Navy, be assured of that."

traits.locale_text: "Emredersiniz Lord Kaptan. Emin olun, bu yaratıkların İmparatorluk Donanması'nın kudretine karşı hiçbir şansı olmayacak."

languages.text: « C'est comme si c'était fait, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Croyez bien que ces créatures n'ont aucune chance face à la puissance de la Marine Impériale. »
